description:
⚡Master Claude Code, Build Your Agency, Land Your First Client⚡
https://www.skool.com/chase-ai

🔥FREE community with tons of AI resources🔥

💻 Need custom work? Book a consult 💻

Mastering Claude Code can be difficult, especially without a roadmap.

In this video, I give you that map as I break down the 6 levels of Claude Code progression, giving you the exact skills you need to master and the traps you need to avoid in order to never stall in your Claude Code progress.

⏰TIMESTAMPS:

0:00 The Roadmap Problem
1:10 Level 1
4:22 Level 2
7:33 Level 3
13:33 Level 4
19:54 Level 5
24:39 Level 6
32:08 More Resources
